series_metadata.series_description: This series relates to copies of letters and underlying public records sent to non-licensees (individuals or organizations) with notice of non-compliance and directives to cease and desist or otherwise evidence compliance with ORC 4732. These letters typcally relate to the use of restricted terms by non-psychologists or the (sometimes inadvertent) listing of non-psychologists under the heading "Psychologists" in public directories (e.g., yellow pages or web-based listings).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Scan paper records digital file (e.g., pdf) on Board storage device; paper determination made by staff that digital file is complete. ; Electronic: scanned digital files (e.g., pdf) ten years, when presumed that use will be exhausted
